approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to keep going, park blocked work, and reduce intelligence-pipe overload without unsafe automation.
scopeSummary: Expose a read-only Dev Hub Scoper Runtime readback that shows schedule/run truth and Director-to-Scoper flow without scheduling or promotion.
constraints: Do not schedule, run, or mutate Scoper jobs from this readback.
Do not auto-promote Director recommendations into Scoper, backlog, Portfolio, decisions, or route destinations.
Do not create or update Scoper cards, backlog cards, Portfolio records, Current Sprint overlays, approval records, or destination records from this readback.
Do not run extraction, source sync, provider/model calls, login, Browserbase, paid/private source work, or external writes.
Do not send Telegram, email, Slack, Agent Feedback, public messages, or Harlan notifications outside the governed ship gate.
Fail proof if the readback starts a schedule/run, writes Scoper/backlog/Portfolio records, or marks a candidate auto-promoted.
